wind.en: Northeast monsoon winds of 12-20 knots are expected through Saturday, easing to 8-12 knots by Sunday as a ridge builds over the region. Gusts to 25 knots possible near headlands during the afternoon hours.
wind.zh: 東北季風風速預計在週六前維持12-20節，週日隨著高壓脊建立將減弱至8-12節。午後岬角附近陣風可達25節。

waves.en: A moderate NE swell of 1.0-1.8m will persist through Friday, with periods around 9-11 seconds. The swell drops to 0.8m by the weekend as the fetch weakens. Best conditions for northeast-facing breaks on Saturday morning.
waves.zh: 中等東北浪高1.0-1.8公尺將持續至週五，週期約9-11秒。週末隨著風區減弱，浪高降至0.8公尺。週六上午為東北向浪點最佳條件。

outlook.en: A weakening cold front approaches Monday with brief rain showers and a wind shift to northerly 15-20 knots. Temperatures drop 2-3 degrees behind the front. Models agree well on timing but diverge on wind strength, so confidence is moderate.
outlook.zh: 減弱冷鋒於週一接近，伴隨短暫陣雨及北風轉15-20節。鋒面過後氣溫下降2-3度。模式對時間點一致但風速分歧，信心度中等。
